summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ScanSavvy landing page with new 'Popular in Your Area' section. All P0 and P1 features working correctly. Backend 100% (18/18 tests passed). Frontend 100% for tested features.
passed_tests: P0 - Popular in Your Area section renders correctly with all components
P0 - Trending deals cards display: Target 25% OFF (HOT), Walmart $10 OFF $50 (NEW), Kroger BOGO Free, CVS 40% OFF
P0 - Local stats display: $47,230 saved by local shoppers, 12,450 coupons redeemed, $18.92 avg savings per trip
P0 - Top savers list: Sarah M. ($156), James T. ($142), Maria L. ($128)
P0 - 'See Deals in My Area' button opens location modal
P1 - Landing page renders all sections: Hero, Store Partners, Popular in Your Area, How It Works, Features, Pricing, Final CTA, Footer
P1 - Location modal opens from 'Find Stores Near Me' button
P1 - ZIP code entry works and shows nearby stores after submission
P1 - Location modal shows 7 nearby stores with coupon counts
P1 - User onboarding flow works: name/email entry -> store selection -> notification preferences -> dashboard redirect
P2 - Dashboard displays QR code bundles for selected stores (Walmart, Target, Kroger)
P2 - Manufacturer coupons section displays when enabled
P2 - Responsive design: Popular section renders correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
Store listing, search, and category filtering
Coupon bundle generation with QR codes
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED - coupon data, store data, user data, location data, and savings statistics are hardcoded/randomly generated
App.js is a large single file (1474 lines) - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P0, P1, P2 features tested and working)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New 'Popular in Your Area' section has been fully tested and is working correctly. All landing page sections render properly. Onboarding flow completes successfully and redirects to dashboard with QR code bundles. Mobile responsive design verified. Previous iteration issues (toggle interactions, modal overlay) appear to be resolved - all interactions worked correctly in this test run.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - No real coupon or location data. Store data is hardcoded, coupon data is randomly generated, location search returns random stores based on ZIP code.
